glosses.ja: キリスト教の; キリスト教徒

translations.vi: Bà tôi là người Kitô hữu.
translations.ja: 祖母はキリスト教徒です。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), feminine singular agreeing with 'grand-mère'; modifies the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate.
Adjective, feminine singular; predicative complement describing 'grand-mère'.

sentences.target: Je découvre la culture chrétienne en voyage.
sentences.reading: /ʒə de.kuvʁ la kyl.tyʁ kʁe.tjɛn ɑ̃ vwa.jaʒ/

translations.fr: Je découvre la culture chrétienne en voyage.
translations.ipa: /ʒə de.kuvʁ la kyl.tyʁ kʁe.tjɛn ɑ̃ vwa.jaʒ/
translations.en: I’m discovering Christian culture while traveling.
translations.es: Estoy descubriendo la cultura cristiana mientras viajo.
translations.de: Ich entdecke auf Reisen die christliche Kultur.
translations.it: Sto scoprendo la cultura cristiana mentre viaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在旅行中了解基督教文化。
translations.yue: 我喺旅行時認識基督教文化。
translations.ru: Путешествуя, я знакомлюсь с христианской культурой.
translations.pt: Estou descobrindo a cultura cristã enquanto viajo.
translations.he: אני מגלה את התרבות הנוצרית כשאני מטייל.
translations.vi: Tôi đang khám phá văn hóa Kitô giáo khi đi du lịch.
translations.nl: Ik ontdek de christelijke cultuur op reis.
translations.uk: Я відкриваю християнську культуру під час подорожей.
translations.hu: Utazás közben felfedezem a keresztény kultúrát.
translations.hi: मैं यात्रा करते हुए ईसाई संस्कृति को खोज रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ανακαλύπτω τον χριστιανικό πολιτισμό ενώ ταξιδεύω.
translations.nb: Jeg oppdager kristen kultur mens jeg er på reise.
translations.id: Saya mengenal budaya Kristen saat bepergian.
translations.sv: Jag upptäcker den kristna kulturen när jag reser.
translations.ro: Descopăr cultura creștină în timp ce călătoresc.
translations.da: Jeg opdager den kristne kultur, mens jeg rejser.
translations.ja: 旅をしながらキリスト教文化を学んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive.
Definite article, feminine singular; marks the noun 'culture'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'découvre'.
Adjective, feminine singular; postnominal modifier of 'culture'.
Preposition; introduces the circumstantial complement 'voyage' (in/while traveling).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'en'.

sentences.target: Ils organisent une fête chrétienne au village.
sentences.reading: /il zɔʁ.ɡa.niz yn fɛt kʁe.tjɛn o vi.laʒ/

translations.fr: Ils organisent une fête chrétienne au village.
translations.ipa: /il zɔʁ.ɡa.niz yn fɛt kʁe.tjɛn o vi.laʒ/
translations.en: They’re organizing a Christian festival in the village.
translations.es: Están organizando un festival cristiano en el pueblo.
translations.de: Sie organisieren ein christliches Fest im Dorf.
translations.it: Stanno organizzando una festa cristiana nel villaggio.
translations.ko: 그들은 마을에서 기독교 축제를 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在村里组织一个基督教节日。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺村度籌辦一個基督教節日。
translations.ru: Они организуют в деревне христианский фестиваль.
translations.pt: Eles estão organizando um festival cristão na vila.
translations.vi: Họ đang tổ chức một lễ hội Kitô giáo trong làng.
translations.ar: إنهم ينظمون مهرجانًا مسيحيًا في القرية.
translations.nl: Ze organiseren een christelijk festival in het dorp.
translations.uk: Вони організовують у селі християнський фестиваль.
translations.hi: वे गाँव में एक ईसाई उत्सव आयोजित कर रहे हैं।
translations.el: Διοργανώνουν ένα χριστιανικό φεστιβάλ στο χωριό.
translations.nb: De arrangerer en kristen festival i landsbyen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menyelenggarakan festival Kristen di desa.
translations.sv: De ordnar en kristen festival i byn.
translations.ro: Ei organizează un festival creștin în sat.
translations.da: De arrangerer en kristen festival i landsbyen.
translations.ja: 彼らは村でキリスト教の祭りを開催しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; takes the direct object 'une fête'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'organisent'.
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies 'fête'.
Contracted preposition ('à' + 'le'); introduces the locative complement 'village'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Tu es chrétien comme tes parents.

translations.fr: Tu es chrétien comme tes parents.
translations.en: You are Christian like your parents.
translations.de: Du bist Christ wie deine Eltern.
translations.it: Sei cristiano come i tuoi genitori.
translations.zh-Hans: 你和你的父母一样是基督徒。
translations.yue: 你同你爸媽一樣係基督徒。
translations.ru: Ты христианин, как и твои родители.
translations.pt: Você é cristão como seus pais.
translations.vi: Bạn là người Kitô hữu như bố mẹ bạn.
translations.nl: Jij bent christen, net als je ouders.
translations.uk: Ти християнин, як і твої батьки.
translations.hi: तुम अपने माता-पिता की तरह ईसाई हो।
translations.el: Είσαι χριστιανός όπως οι γονείς σου.
translations.nb: Du er kristen som foreldrene dine.
translations.sv: Du är kristen som dina föräldrar.
translations.da: Du er kristen ligesom dine forældre.
translations.ja: 君は両親と同じキリスト教徒だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; links the subject to the predicate.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicative complement describing 'tu'.
Preposition meaning 'like/as'; introduces a comparison with 'tes parents'.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), plural; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition 'comme'.
